scripts.build:openapi: npx @redocly/cli bundle openapi/openapi.yaml -o openapi.yaml && cp openapi.yaml mintlify/openapi.yaml
scripts.lint:openapi: npx @redocly/cli bundle openapi/openapi.yaml -o openapi.yaml && npx @redocly/cli lint openapi.yaml && npx spectral lint openapi.yaml --fail-severity=error && cp openapi.yaml mintlify/openapi.yaml
